text: An elderly man appeared as if summoned from the opposite corner of the boathouse.

sequence.speaker: Walsh
text: Well I wouldn't say _that_ yet, not yet at least...

sequence.speaker: Narrator
text: The man retorted with an overwhelming boisterousness.

sequence.speaker: Walsh
text: But soon I'll make sure you're capable. Call me Captain Walsh.

sequence.speaker: Narrator
text: They exchanged a basic handshake. Captain Walsh's right hand felt pruned by the sea.

sequence.speaker: Narrator
text: Despite this, the strength of the grip felt uncomfortably firm.

sequence.speaker: Narrator
text: Abel looked over his shoulder and glanced at the boat. His heart sank. He didn't expect luxury but at least had hoped for something that looked like a rusted tin can.

sequence.speaker: Walsh
text: Well, daylight's a-wasting. Hop inside and I'll show you the ropes.

has_met.speaker: Walsh
text: Stop wasting time and hop in!
